productDisplayName: Puma Men Kollege Mid Brown Casual Shoes
description: These stylish Kollege Mid leather shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive high collar design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Leather and suede uppers for durability and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Extended suede collar for greater style Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name embossed onto a suede patch that is appliqued on the woven tongue Stitch detailing in the shape of formstripes on the sides Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort EVA midsole for greater shock absorption Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole with criss cross line grooves for greater traction
